description: Invoice line detail table for Oracle Accounts Payable. Each record represents a supplier invoice line such as an item, tax, freight, miscellaneous charge, or prepayment application and supports invoice matching, charge allocation, receiving verification, project coding, and downstream accounting distributions.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier invoice. Used to relate the invoice header to lines, distributions, payment schedules, and payment history.

columns.name: LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business sequence number identifying the invoice line within its parent document.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying line type lookup for the record.

columns.name: REQUESTER_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the employee or user who requested the expense or purchase-related transaction.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: LINE_SOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: LINE_GROUP_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence line group nu.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory item master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: ITEM_DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Descriptive text explaining item.

columns.name: SERIAL_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence serial nu.

columns.name: MANUFACTURER
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MODEL_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence model nu.

columns.name: WARRANTY_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence warranty nu.

columns.name: GENERATE_DISTS
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MATCH_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control match processing.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the predefined distribution set used to default accounting information.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_SEGMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: BALANCING_SEGMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: COST_CENTER_SEGMENT
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: OVERLAY_DIST_CODE_CONCAT
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DEFAULT_DIST_CCID
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PRORATE_ACROSS_ALL_ITEMS
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_DATE
columns.description: Accounting date used to recognize the transaction in Subledger Accounting and General Ledger.

columns.name: PERIOD_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with period.

columns.name: DEFERRED_ACCTG_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether deferred acctg applies to the record.

columns.name: DEF_ACCTG_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of the deferred accounting recognition period.

columns.name: DEF_ACCTG_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of the deferred accounting recognition period.

columns.name: DEF_ACCTG_NUMBER_OF_PERIODS
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DEF_ACCTG_PERIOD_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control def acctg period processing.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for the transaction in the transaction currency.

columns.name: BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Functional currency amount derived from the entered transaction amount.

columns.name: ROUNDING_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for rounding.

columns.name: QUANTITY_INVOICED
columns.description: Quantity associated with quantity for the transaction.

columns.name: UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying unit meas lookup for the record.

columns.name: UNIT_PRICE
columns.description: Unit price used to calculate the transaction amount.

columns.name: WFAPPROVAL_STATUS
columns.description: Workflow approval status recorded for the transaction or line.

columns.name: USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ussgl transaction for the record.

columns.name: DISCARDED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether discarded applies to the record.

columns.name: ORIGINAL_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing original for the transaction.

columns.name: ORIGINAL_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing original base for the transaction.

columns.name: ORIGINAL_ROUNDING_AMT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for original rounding.

columns.name: CANCELLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether cancelled applies to the record.

columns.name: INCOME_TAX_REGION
columns.description: Income tax region used for statutory reporting or withholding processing.

columns.name: TYPE_1099
columns.description: 1099 reporting classification assigned to the supplier transaction for statutory reporting.

columns.name: STAT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing stat for the transaction.

columns.name: PREPAY_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related prepay invoice record.

columns.name: PREPAY_LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence prepay line nu.

columns.name: INVOICE_INCLUDES_PREPAY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether invoice includes prepay applies to the record.

columns.name: CORRECTED_INV_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related corrected inv record.

columns.name: CORRECTED_LINE_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence corrected line nu.

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Purchase order header referenced by the matched transaction.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Purchase order line referenced by the matched transaction.

columns.name: PO_RELEASE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the purchase order release associated with the transaction.

columns.name: PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the purchase order shipment line associated with the transaction.

columns.name: PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
columns.description: Purchase order distribution referenced by the matched transaction.

columns.name: RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the receiving transaction associated with the invoice match or inventory event.

columns.name: FINAL_MATCH_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether final match applies to the record.

columns.name: ASSETS_TRACKING_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether assets tracking applies to the record.

columns.name: ASSET_BOOK_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying asset book type for the record.

columns.name: ASSET_CATEGORY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Oracle Assets category used for capitalization or asset tracking.

columns.name: PROJECT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the project charged by the transaction.

columns.name: TASK_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the task charged by the project-related transaction.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control expenditure processing.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with expenditure item.

columns.name: EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related expenditure organization record.

columns.name: PA_QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity associated with pa for the transaction.

columns.name: PA_CC_AR_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related pa cc ar invoice record.

columns.name: PA_CC_AR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence pa cc ar invoice line.

columns.name: PA_CC_PROCESSED_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pa cc processed for the record.

columns.name: AWARD_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the award or grant associated with the transaction.

columns.name: AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the withholding tax group applied to the transaction.

columns.name: REFERENCE_1
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: REFERENCE_2
columns.description: Reference value used for integration, reconciliation, or business traceability.

columns.name: RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether receipt verified applies to the record.

columns.name: RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether receipt required applies to the record.

columns.name: RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether receipt missing applies to the record.

columns.name: JUSTIFICATION
columns.description: Free-text explanation entered to document the business purpose of the record.

columns.name: EXPENSE_GROUP
columns.description: Grouping value used to classify or process expense.

columns.name: START_EXPENSE_DATE
columns.description: Start date of the expense period covered by the line or distribution.

columns.name: END_EXPENSE_DATE
columns.description: End date of the expense period covered by the line or distribution.

columns.name: RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying receipt currency for the record.

columns.name: RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value receipt conversion for the transaction.

columns.name: RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing receipt currency for the transaction.

columns.name: DAILY_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing daily for the transaction.

columns.name: WEB_PARAMETER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related web parameter record.

columns.name: ADJUSTMENT_REASON
columns.description: Business reason captured for adjustment.

columns.name: MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence merchant document nu.

columns.name: MERCHANT_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with merchant.

columns.name: MERCHANT_REFERENCE
columns.description: Reference supplied by the merchant for the card or expense transaction.

columns.name: MERCHANT_TAX_REG_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence merchant tax reg nu.

columns.name: MERCHANT_TAXPAYER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related merchant taxpayer record.

columns.name: COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice line used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID

columns.name: COMPANY_PREPAID_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related company prepaid invoice record.

columns.name: CC_REVERSAL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether cc reversal applies to the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: LINE_SELECTED_FOR_APPL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether line selected for appl applies to the record.

columns.name: PREPAY_APPL_REQUEST_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related prepay appl request record.

columns.name: APPLICATION_ID

columns.name: TAX_ALREADY_CALCULATED_FLAG

columns.name: SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID

business_questions: Show invoice line details for a supplier invoice.
List item, tax, freight, and miscellaneous lines by invoice.
Find invoice lines matched to purchase orders or receipts.
Show invoice lines with quantity, unit price, and amount.
Identify expense report lines missing receipts or justification.
List invoice lines charged to projects or awards.
Find cancelled or discarded invoice lines.
Show invoice lines awaiting distribution generation or approval.
